en-US.title: Odysseus Companion
en-US.subtitle: Private AI companion
en-US.description:
Odysseus Companion connects your trusted iPhone to an Odysseus server you control.

Use it to scan or paste an admin-generated companion payload, continue owner-scoped chat sessions, select server-provided models, and run manifest-driven signed commands from a private device.

Key features:
- QR and manual pairing
- Persistent chat sessions
- Server-sent event streaming
- Stop and resume support for active prompts
- Model and session selection
- Manifest-driven command catalog
- Device-held command signing keys
- Local network and trusted HTTPS pairing flows

Odysseus Companion is intended for users who operate or have access to an Odysseus server with the companion API enabled. The app does not include a hosted Odysseus account service.
en-US.releaseNotes: Initial App Store build with Odysseus companion pairing, persistent chat sessions, streaming chat, signed commands, production app icons, and the Odysseus sail logo.
en-US.promoText: Pair a trusted iPhone with your Odysseus server for private companion chat and signed command workflows.

review.notes: Odysseus Companion is a client for a user-operated Odysseus server. Testing requires an Odysseus server with the companion API enabled and an admin-generated pairing payload. The first screen supports QR scanning and manual JSON payload entry. Camera access is used only for pairing QR scanning; local network access is used only for same-network Odysseus servers.
